description: You are a municipal clerk preparing the 2026 Official Voter Information Pamphlet. Format the document at /home/ga/Documents/voter_pamphlet.odt as a landscape, two-column booklet. The main title '2026 Official Voter Information Pamphlet' must be bold, centered, and at least 16pt font size, followed immediately by a Table of Contents. Format the three main Measure titles as Heading 1 and sub-section headers (e.g., 'Impartial Analysis', 'Argument in Favor', 'Argument Against') as Heading 2. Apply justified alignment to all body paragraphs and right-align the names and titles of the argument signers. Save the completed document.

section_headings: Impartial Analysis by the City Attorney
body_samples: The City Council has placed Measure A on the ballot
To ensure our schools remain safe and equipped
This bond will cost the average homeowner
Measure B proposes a special parcel tax
Measure B provides critical funding for our parks
The city has a history of mismanaging funds
Under current law, the Mayor may serve an unlimited
Voters should have the right to retain experienced leadership
signature_samples: Patricia Chen, Coalition for Fair Taxes
David Kim, Citizens for Good Government
